name: Cooper Pratt
summary: Cooper Pratt is a shortstop prospect with a high baseball IQ and impressive contact ability, leading to solid on-base skills. He is considered an outstanding defender at shortstop with a plus arm. While his power is still developing, his projectable frame suggests potential for more pop in the future, and he won a Minor League Gold Glove in 2024.

recentNews.title: Brewers Sign Infielder Cooper Pratt to Multi-Year Contract
recentNews.summary: The Milwaukee Brewers have signed infielder Cooper Pratt to an eight-year contract through 2033 with club options for 2034 and 2035, adding him to the 40-man roster and optioning him to Triple-A Nashville.

recentNews.title: Why the Brewers Gave Cooper Pratt $50 Million Before He Earned MLB Promotion
recentNews.summary: The article discusses the Milwaukee Brewers' decision to sign shortstop prospect Cooper Pratt to an eight-year, $50.75 million contract extension before his MLB debut, highlighting his defensive prowess and the team's long-term plans.

recentNews.title: What's Next for the Brewers Following the Cooper Pratt Extension?
recentNews.summary: This article analyzes the Milwaukee Brewers' eight-year, $50 million extension with shortstop prospect Cooper Pratt, detailing his minor league performance, defensive abilities, and the implications for the team's future middle infield.
